name: xs-leak-labs
description: Educational XS-Leak labs: download detection and WebSocket pool detection.

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check labs/download-detection/app.js && node --check labs/websocket-detection/app.js && node --check e2e/download-detection.spec.js && node --check e2e/websocket-detection.spec.js && node --check e2e/helpers/server-control.js && node --check playwright.config.js
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:download && npm run test:e2e:websocket
scripts.test:e2e:all: npm run test:e2e:download:all; npm run test:e2e:websocket:all
scripts.test:e2e:websocket:all: echo "[note] websocket-chrome is expected to fail" && playwright test -c playwright.config.js --project=websocket-firefox --project=websocket-chrome --project=websocket-safari
scripts.test:e2e:websocket:chrome: echo "[note] websocket-chrome is expected to fail" && playwright test -c playwright.config.js --project=websocket-chrome
